inputs.titre: Les Bleus (France) triomphent en Ligue des Nations face à l'Équipe espagnole

reason: The image depicts a modern football stadium with bright stadium lights. The players are wearing modern jerseys with numbers on the back. Several people are holding up smartphones to take pictures, which is a major anachronism for any period before the late 2000s. The image contains too many anachronisms to be considered historically accurate for any period before the 21st century.
